arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wall -O2 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -T../STM32F407XX_FLASH.ld -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Core/Src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Core/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_msp.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Core/Src/stm32f4xx_it.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Core/Src/syscalls.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Core/Src/sysmem.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Core/Src/system_stm32f4xx.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_cortex.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_dma.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_dma_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_exti.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ramfunc.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_gpio.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_hcd.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_nand.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_nor.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_pccard.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_pwr.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_pwr_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_rcc.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_rcc_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_rtc.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_rtc_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_sram.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_fsmc.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_usb.c.o CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/startup_stm32f407xx.s.o -o firmware.elf
